name: Wendigo
mutagen_message: You break out into a cold sweat that oddly smells like pine-sol.

name: Contaminated wendigo mutagen
description: Mutagen cocktail simply labeled 'DO NOT USE: CONTAMINATED BATCH'

name: Contaminated wendigo mutagenic primer
description: A super-concentrated black and purple sheened substance with glittering green flecks that reminds you of a tree. It is labeled 'DO NOT USE: MADE FROM CONTAMINATED BATCH'

use_action.activation_message: You inject the contaminated wendigo mutagenic primer.

name: Wendigo? Mutation
Wendigo? Transformation
Wendigo? Metamorphosis
desc: The woods could be your home, you just know it.
Maybe you should just fall into the inky black abyss...
blood_analysis_description:
Trace amounts of Slime Mutagen Contamination
Wendigo Mutagen Contamination

messages: You have a strange dream about the mountain forests.
Your dreams give you a peculiar feeling of rotting into tar.
You have a vivid dream of stalking through the woods.
You dream of drinking copious amounts of warm water.
You have a dream of chasing something as a raw hunger sears your mind.
Recollections of stalking a human shakes you awake.
You dream of absorbing more and more enemies.
You have a lucid dream where nature carefully welcomes your body.
